name: R-10 detector recognizes both `export type ButtonProps = { ... }` and `export interface ButtonProps { ... }` declarations
command: mkdir -p before after && printf 'export interface ButtonProps { label: string; }\n' > before/Button.tsx && printf 'export interface ButtonProps { label: string; loading: boolean; }\n' > after/Button.tsx && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/component-api-drift.sh" --before before --after after 2>err.txt && grep -q 'kind=prop_added' err.txt && echo recognized 1>&2
